subject: Cutiefly — a tiny round insect-like Pokémon with large round wings, antenna, and a small round body with a simple face
description: A very small, round-bodied insect creature with large oval wings and a simple dot-eyed face rests or hovers in a warm pink setting. The creature's wings have a distinctive banded pattern in cream and yellow. The background is soft pink with minimal detail, keeping focus on the tiny subject. The composition has a close, intimate quality given the diminutive size of the subject — the creature appears gentle and harmless.
foreground: Tiny round insect creature with large banded wings
